description: Style Note This stylish belt from pieces is the right accessory choice when you want to add a dash of kistch to your monochrome ensemble. Wear this too snazz up a plain ensemble or match it with a bohemian look! Product Details Slim blue belt with perforated details Tang clasp and holes to customise the Fit Scalloped edges for style Material and Care Synthetic Wipe with a clean cloth to remove dust
